title: 项目背景与问题

sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: All final slides must be generated by the built-in image_gen tool.

prompt:
Use case: productivity-visual
Asset type: 16:9 full-slide PowerPoint slide image
Primary request: Generate one complete PPT slide for a Chinese software course-design defense. The topic is a traffic sign recognition system. The slide should focus on product/system explanation, not only frontend operation.
Style/medium: 16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image, formal but not over-designed Chinese university software course-design defense, light background, refined blue and teal palette, small orange only for warning/risk, realistic product and technical presentation style, traffic sign recognition system theme, high-quality visual hierarchy, moderate information density, no cyberpunk, no dark stage, no neon, no excessive decoration, no childish cartoon, no watermark, no fake brand.
Slide title text (verbatim, plain text only): "项目背景与问题"
Subtitle text (verbatim): "高速道路标志信息需要被及时识别、记录和利用"
Key text labels (verbatim, render as readable short bullets/cards):
- "道路标志类型多"
- "人工巡检效率低"
- "驾驶员容易漏看"
- "数据难以沉淀"
Visual composition: realistic road scene with multiple traffic signs, inspector tablet, alert card, problem callouts.
Layout: formal defense slide, strong title hierarchy, polished body visual, moderate information density, suitable for projector.
Constraints: Render Chinese text exactly as provided where possible. Use large readable Chinese sans-serif typography. Do not add plus signs near titles, random symbols, fake logos, QR codes, page numbers, watermarks, or English filler. Keep the slide clean and suitable for a classroom defense projector.
Output: one finished 16:9 slide image generated by the image model, not a template and not a local diagram.
